name: ProcessRptExtr_EE

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH T1 AS (SELECT r.SUBJ_CD, r.SRC_SYS_CD, r.TRGT_SYS_CD, r.STRT_DTM, r.END_DTM, c.DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, CAST(r.END_DTM - r.STRT_DTM AS VARCHAR(30)) AS DURATION, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY r.STRT_DTM) AS NUMBERROW FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC r, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_BTCH_CYC b, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLNDR_DT c WHERE r.SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AND r.TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TargetSys}' AND r.SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SourceSys}' AND r.BTCH_CYC_SK = b.BTCH_CYC_SK AND b.BTCH_CYC_DESC = c.CLNDR_DT_SK AND r.RUN_CYC_NO = @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle}), T2 AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, SUBSTRING(DURATION, 10, 2) + ':' + SUBSTRING(DURATION, 12, 2) AS TIME_DURATION, NUMBERROW AS ROW_COUNT FROM T1) SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, TIME_DURATION, ROW_COUNT FROM T2 ORDER BY STRT_DTM
